changelog.note: Reference prototype — evidence-based skincare curriculum authored from dermatologist/科普 sources (Lab Muffin, AAD, Dr. Dray, Paula's Choice, INCIDecoder). Non-cognitive (physical+behavioral) skill with heavy marketing noise: 4 modules carry honest_limits (can't-see-skin / patch-test / conditions-need-derm / skin-cancer ABCDE). NOT medical advice. Full 8-route web run via `update 私教 skincare`.
